text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🛢️ Saudi Arabia has restored the East–West oil pipeline and the Manifa field to full operation. ▪️ The facilities are now functioning normally again. ▪️ Earlier attacks had reduced production at the Manifa field by 300,000 barrels per day and cut pipeline transport by 700,000 barrels per day. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：🛢️ 沙特阿拉伯已恢复东西向输油管道和曼尼法（Manifa）油田的全面运营。▪️ 这些设施现已恢复正常运作。▪️ 此前的袭击曾导致曼尼法油田的产量每天减少30万桶，管道运输量每天减少70万桶。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: “Before the negotiations, I emphasized that we have the necessary good faith and will, but due to the experiences of the two previous wars, we have no trust in the opposing side. My colleagues on the Iranian delegation Minaab168 raised forward-looking initiatives, but the opposing side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“在谈判之前，我强调我们具备必要的诚意和意愿，但由于此前两次战争的经验，我们对对方没有信任。我的伊朗代表团同事Minaab168提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终没能在本轮谈判中赢得伊朗代表团的信任。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : This is the best upsum I’ve read, although I confess to being biased given the authorship. Key line: “The new norm involves periodic precision strikes against Iran, deployed not for the purpose of regime change but for containment. Tehran, in turn, will be forced to internalize a posture of resistance it has spent decades exporting and leading from the rear.” The end of American restraint broke a quarter-century taboo & shattered Iran's doctrine of exporting its wars. Once that happened, any US policy shifts stopped being the determining factor of where the Third Gulf War takes the region. With @KamranBokhari https://newlinesmag.com/essays/the-third-gulf-war-and-its-aftermath/ - Hassan I. Hassan tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss ：这是我读过的最好的总结，尽管我承认由于作者身份，我可能存在偏见。关键句：“新的常态涉及对伊朗进行周期性的精确打击，其部署目的不是为了政权更迭，而是为了遏制。反过来，德黑兰将被迫内化一种它几十年来一直在出口并从后方领导的抵抗姿态。” 美国克制的终结打破了四分之一个世纪的禁忌，粉碎了伊朗输出战争的学说。一旦发生这种情况，任何美国政策的转变都不再是决定第三次海湾战争将把该地区带向何方的决定性因素。与 @KamranBokhari https://newlinesmag.com/essays/the-third-gulf-war-and-its-aftermath/ - Hassan I. Hassan 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says troops dismantled an explosives lab in Tulkarem, seizing materials for lEDs including hundreds of pipe bombs and over 50 kg of explosives. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043256268236697937/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军称部队拆除了图勒凯尔姆的一个爆炸物实验室，查获了包括数百枚管状炸弹和超过50公斤炸药在内的简易爆炸装置材料。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043256268236697937/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : I had this thought today. What the world witnessed between the U.S. and Israel against Iran was one of the largest coordinated air campaigns ever launched against a single nation-state by two allied powers. Few operations, if any, in the modern era compare. In the first 72 hours alone, over 1,700 targets were struck. By day seven, the U.S. had hit more than 3,000. By day ten, 5,000. The final U.S. tally: over 13,000 targets. More than 2,000 command and control sites. 1,500 air defense positions. 450 ballistic missile targets. 600 naval targets. Israel matched that tempo on its own terms. In 18 days, the Israeli Air Force flew what it normally flies in a full year. More than 12,000 munitions dropped. 8,500 strikes across Iran. 5,700 combat sorties in the Iranian theater alone. 7,000 targets struck across all fronts of operation. Before Iran could respond meaningfully, Israel had destroyed 80 to 85 percent of Iran’s air defense architecture. Radars. Interceptors. Detection systems. Gone. Iran was producing roughly 100 ballistic missiles per month before the war. That capacity is now close to zero. The first 24 hours were double the firepower of the opening of the 2003 Iraq War. Desert Storm opened with 150 targets. Epic Fury opened with 1,700. The most sustained joint air campaign of the 21st century. By two countries. Footage from CENTCOM compiled by @Osinttechnical tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 转发 @Osint613 ：我今天有这样一个想法。世界在美以两国针对伊朗的行动中所见证的，是两个盟国针对单一民族国家发起的有史以来最大规模的协同空中战役之一。现代史上几乎没有（如果有的话）行动可以与之相比。仅在最初的72小时内，就有超过1700个目标被击中。到第七天，美国已经打击了超过3000个目标。到第十天，达到5000个。美国最终的统计数字：超过13000个目标。超过2000个指挥和控制站点。1500个防空阵地。450个弹道导弹目标。600个海军目标。以色列以自己的方式匹配了这一节奏。在18天内，以色列空军的飞行量相当于其通常一整年的飞行量。投下了超过12000枚弹药。在伊朗境内进行了8500次打击。仅在伊朗战区就进行了5700次战斗出动。在所有作战前线共打击了7000个目标。在伊朗能够做出有意义的回应之前，以色列已经摧毁了伊朗80%到85%的防空架构。雷达。拦截器。探测系统。全部消失。战争前，伊朗每月大约生产100枚弹道导弹。这一产能现在几乎为零。最初24小时的火力是2003年伊拉克战争开局的两倍。“沙漠风暴”行动以150个目标开局。“史诗愤怒”（Epic Fury）行动以1700个目标开局。这是21世纪最持续的联合空中战役。由两个国家发起。由 @Osinttechnical 汇编的来自中央司令部的镜头 推文

text: Open Source Intel My thoughts on the US/Iran negotiations: Vice President Vance says the U.S. has issued a final offer, signaling Washington is not planning to reopen terms. Tehran is likely to push for continued talks, leveraging its track record as a super negotiator, everyone knows the Persians know how to negotiate, just try buying a Persian carpet. The current U.S. position goes well beyond the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action, expanding from nuclear limits to 4 core demands: 1. Nuclear program restrictions 2. Ballistic missile limits 3. Halt funding to regional proxies 4. Keep the Strait of Hormuz open These are far broader and more demanding than previous frameworks. President Trump is also signaling escalation: if Hormuz access is restricted, the U.S. could move toward a full naval blockade of Iran’s oil exports, aiming to cut off regime revenue. Let’s see where this goes. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 我对美伊谈判的看法：副总统万斯表示，美国已经发布了最终提议，表明华盛顿不打算重新开启条款。德黑兰很可能会利用其作为超级谈判者的记录推动继续会谈，每个人都知道波斯人懂得如何谈判，试着买一张波斯地毯就知道了。目前的美国立场远远超出了《联合全面行动计划》，从核限制扩展到4项核心要求：1. 核计划限制 2. 弹道导弹限制 3. 停止资助地区代理人 4. 保持霍尔木兹海峡畅通。这些要求比之前的框架要广泛和苛刻得多。特朗普总统也在发出升级信号：如果霍尔木兹海峡的通行受到限制，美国可能会采取对伊朗石油出口进行全面海军封锁的行动，旨在切断政权收入。让我们看看事态如何发展。推文

text: WarTranslated In Russia’s Komsomolsk-on-Amur, hundreds of Chinese workers went on strike at a refinery over unpaid wages. They were promised payment. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043255198236209661/video/1 tweet

text: 📸 Türkiye's ASELSAN announces that mass production and delivery of homegrown LGK-82 laser guidance kits is ongoing after completing factory acceptance tests. The kit is designed for high-precision strikes against fixed and moving targets with reduced collateral damage.
text_zh: 📸 土耳其ASELSAN公司宣布，在完成工厂验收测试后，国产LGK-82激光制导套件的批量生产和交付工作正在进行中。该套件专为对固定和移动目标进行高精度打击而设计，并能减少附带损害。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Zionist occupiers are deliberately intensifying the humanitarian crisis in Gaza by extensively restricting the entry of aid, including flour, which has led to a continuous increase in bread prices amid severe poverty in Gaza. - Hamas
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义占领者正在通过广泛限制包括面粉在内的援助物资进入，蓄意加剧加沙的人道主义危机，这导致在加沙严重的贫困中面包价格持续上涨。 - 哈马斯

text: Iran's Ghalibaf on failed negotiations with the U.S. in Pakistan: We have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experience of two previous wars, we do not trust the other side. The other side ultimately failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of negotiations America has understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for it to decide whether it can earn our trust or not. We consider ‘power diplomacy’ another method alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫就与美国在巴基斯坦的谈判失败表示：我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于此前两次战争的经验，我们不信任对方。对方最终没能在本轮谈判中赢得伊朗代表团的信任。美国已经理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是它决定是否能赢得我们信任的时候了。我们认为“权力外交”是与军事斗争并行的另一种确保伊朗民族权利的方法。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf said that after 21 hours of intense talks in Islamabad, the U.S. failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. “America understood our logic and principles. Now it is time for them to decide whether they can earn our trust,” he stated. Ghalibaf noted that Iran had good faith and will, but due to the experience of two previous wars, there is no trust in the US. He described “diplomacy of power” as another path alongside military struggle to secure Iran’s rights. He thanked Pakistan for facilitating the talks and praised the Iranian people for their support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫表示，经过在伊斯兰堡的21小时激烈会谈，美国未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。“美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则。现在是他们决定是否能赢得我们信任的时候了，”他说道。卡利巴夫指出，伊朗有诚意和意愿，但由于此前两次战争的经验，对美国没有信任。他将“权力外交”描述为与军事斗争并行的另一条道路，以确保伊朗的权利。他感谢巴基斯坦为会谈提供便利，并赞扬了伊朗人民的支持。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Parliament Speaker Qalibaf: — US failed to earn Iran’s trust despite Iran’s goodwill and constructive proposals during the latest round of talks. — Iran entered the negotiations with serious intent, but past experiences from previous wars left Tehran skeptical. — Iran’s delegation presented forward-looking initiatives, yet the other side ultimately could not build confidence. — The US now understands Iran’s principles and must decide whether it can gain Iran’s trust. — Iran views “power diplomacy” as a key tool alongside military resistance to secure the nation’s rights, and will not stop working to consolidate the achievements of its 40 days of national defense. — Grateful to 'friendly and brotherly' Pakistan for hosting. — Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank all the heroic people of Iran who, following the advice of the Supreme Leader and by being present in the streets, supported their children and accompanied us with their prayers, and I say well done to my colleagues in these intense 21-hour negotiations. Long live and prosper dear Iran!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：— 尽管伊朗在最新一轮会谈中表现出善意并提出了建设性建议，但美国未能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗带着严肃的意图参加了谈判，但此前战争的经验让德黑兰持怀疑态度。— 伊朗代表团提出了前瞻性的倡议，但对方最终没能建立信心。— 美国现在理解了伊朗的原则，必须决定是否能赢得伊朗的信任。— 伊朗将“权力外交”视为与军事抵抗并行的关键工具，以确保国家的权利，并将继续努力巩固其40天国防的成果。— 感谢“友好和兄弟般的”巴基斯坦主办此次会谈。— 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的整体。我感谢所有英雄般的伊朗人民，他们遵循最高领袖的建议，出现在街头，支持他们的孩子并用祈祷陪伴我们，我也要对我在这些长达21小时的激烈谈判中的同事们说干得好。亲爱的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ Mihály Tóth-Szöke, a Fidesz member and mayor of the village of Bocsa in Bács-Kiskun County, voted for Tisza. ▪️ In a post on his Facebook page, he said his choice was “against Russian influence and in favor of European values.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043254526237434042/photo/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated Peter Magyar says if Tisza wins he will cap the prime minister’s tenure at two terms. He says about 60 reports of election fraud have already come in. Turnout at 9 AM hit a record 16.98 percent, the National Election Office says. Orban said he came to win, while Peter Magyar framed the vote as a choice between East and West and warned Fidesz may stage fraud and provocations. Turnout in Hungary’s parliamentary elections hit 3.46% by 7 AM, a record and nearly double the same hour four years ago. The main race is Fidesz vs Tisza with Peter Magyar leading in polls, a pivotal vote for Hungary and for Orban. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 彼得·马扎尔表示，如果蒂萨党获胜，他将把总理任期限制在两届。他说已经收到了约60起选举舞弊的报告。据国家选举办公室称，上午9点的投票率创下了16.98%的纪录。欧尔班表示他是来获胜的，而彼得·马扎尔将投票定性为东西方之间的选择，并警告青民盟可能会制造舞弊和挑衅。匈牙利议会选举上午7点的投票率达到3.46%，创下纪录，几乎是四年前同一时间的双倍。主要的竞争是青民盟对阵蒂萨党，彼得·马扎尔在民调中领先，这对匈牙利和欧尔班来说是一次关键的投票。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043224521814004120/video/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW Alerts in northern Israel over Hezbollah attack tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 现在 以色列北部因真主党袭击发出警报 推文

text: Open Source Intel China has denied supplying weapons to Iran, with its embassy in Washington calling the allegations incorrect https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043241857224765489/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中国否认向伊朗提供武器，其驻华盛顿大使馆称这些指控是不正确的 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043241857224765489/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated Budanov says a new POW exchange could happen by the end of the week. April 11 was just the start of the Easter POW exchange, with more releases ahead, says Andriy Yusov, deputy head of Ukraine’s POW coordination HQ. He adds humanitarian initiatives were rejected, but the work goes on. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 布达诺夫表示，新的战俘交换可能会在本周末进行。乌克兰战俘协调总部副主任安德里·尤索夫（Andriy Yusov）表示，4月11日只是复活节战俘交换的开始，未来还会有更多人员获释。他补充说，人道主义倡议被拒绝了，但工作仍在继续。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ U.S.-Iran talks have ended without success, with no peace agreement reached. Vance stated this is worse news for Tehran than for Washington. 📌 “They chose not to accept our terms — we worked for 21 hours. We had substantive discussions… The bad news is we failed to reach an agreement.” 🟦 Vance appears unmoved by what he described as misleading rhetoric from Iran’s leadership, which he suggested believes it holds the advantage. 📌 “The simple fact is we need clear confirmation that they will not pursue nuclear weapons or the capabilities to rapidly develop them.” 🇮🇷 Iran also confirmed that negotiations in Islamabad ended without a deal, blaming Washington’s “excessive demands” for the lack of progress. 🟥 Reports indicate the main points of contention were transit rights in the Strait of Hormuz and Iran’s nuclear program. 🇺🇸 U.S. negotiators have already left Pakistan after the high-stakes talks collapsed, leaving key disputes unresolved. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 ：#突发 ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 美伊会谈以失败告终，未达成和平协议。万斯表示这对德黑兰来说比对华盛顿来说是更糟糕的消息。📌 “他们选择不接受我们的条款 — 我们工作了21个小时。我们进行了实质性的讨论……坏消息是我们未能达成协议。” 🟦 万斯似乎对伊朗领导层所谓的误导性言论不为所动，他认为伊朗领导层认为自己占据优势。📌 “简单的事实是，我们需要明确的确认，他们不会追求核武器或快速开发核武器的能力。” 🇮🇷 伊朗也证实伊斯兰堡的谈判没有达成协议，并将进展缓慢归咎于华盛顿的“过度要求”。 🟥 报告显示，主要的争议点是霍尔木兹海峡的过境权和伊朗的核计划。 🇺🇸 在高风险会谈破裂后，美国谈判代表已经离开巴基斯坦，留下了关键争议未解决。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇮🇷 RT exclusive: “All vessels entering the Strait of Hormuz must pay tolls under a new control system” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi “Government must establish full management and control of the Strait based on national interests”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 RT独家：“所有进入霍尔木兹海峡的船只必须根据新的控制系统支付通行费” — 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹 “政府必须根据国家利益建立对海峡的全面管理和控制”

text: 🇮🇷 “We simply do not trust the Americans” — Iran’s security chief Ebrahim Azizi to RT “How can a nation built on arrogance and colonialism respect others or honor its agreements?”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 “我们根本不信任美国人” — 伊朗安全主管易卜拉欣·阿齐兹接受RT采访 “一个建立在傲慢和殖民主义基础上的国家怎么能尊重他人或遵守其协议？”

text: 🇮🇷 Current status of ships in the Strait of Hormuz after the end of Islamabad negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰堡谈判结束后霍尔木兹海峡船只的当前状态。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部对抗线地区激活。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部对抗线地区的谢莫纳城（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区激活。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 无人机警报在以色列北部对抗线地区激活。@wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 Ukraine will open the "Druzhba" oil pipeline immediately after the elections in Hungary, Orban believes. "We will win the elections and the next morning, the Ukrainians will open it," he told RIA Novosti. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇺🇦 欧尔班认为，乌克兰将在匈牙利选举后立即开放“友谊”（Druzhba）输油管道。“我们将赢得选举，第二天早上，乌克兰人就会开放它，”他告诉俄新社。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Kyiv says Russia committed 2,299 violations of the Easter ceasefire, while Moscow claims Ukraine violated it 1,971 times.
text_zh: 基辅称俄罗斯违反复活节停火协议2299次，而莫斯科声称乌克兰违反了1971次。

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 At least 30 people died in a stampede at Haiti’s Citadelle Laferrière fortress in Milot after a gathering promoted on TikTok, which drew a large crowd including school-age children as young as 12. Heavy rain reportedly triggered panic during the event. Officials say most of the victims died from asphyxiation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇹 在海地米洛（Milot）的拉费里埃城堡（Citadelle Laferrière），一场在TikTok上宣传的聚会引发了踩踏事件，造成至少30人死亡，聚会吸引了包括低至12岁的学龄儿童在内的大量人群。据报道，大雨在活动期间引发了恐慌。官员称大多数受害者死于窒息。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's state television broadcast said that the United States' "demanding too much" was an obstacle to reaching an agreement. The report said the major sticking points were the opening of the Strait of Hormuz, Iran's rights to enrich uranium, and "other issues." "Despite various creative approaches by the Iranian team, the Americans' overreach and unreasonable demands prevented talks from advancing," the state television report said
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗国家电视台广播称，美国“要求过多”是达成协议的障碍。报道称，主要的症结在于霍尔木兹海峡的开放、伊朗浓缩铀的权利以及“其他问题”。“尽管伊朗团队采取了各种创造性的方法，但美国人的越权和不合理要求阻碍了会谈的推进，”国家电视台报道称

text: Reporter: Precisely, what have they rejected here? JD Vance: We need to see an affirmative commitment that they will not seek a nuclear weapon, and they will not seek the tools that would enable them to quickly achieve a nuclear weapon.
text_zh: 记者：准确地说，他们在这里拒绝了什么？JD·万斯：我们需要看到一个肯定的承诺，即他们不会寻求核武器，也不会寻求使他们能够迅速获得核武器的工具。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Bloomberg: Two oil tankers have turned back in the Strait of Hormuz following the failure of US-Iranian talks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 彭博社：在美伊会谈失败后，两艘油轮在霍尔木兹海峡掉头。

text: Canadian PM Mark Carney: The days of our military sending 70 cents of every dollar to the United States are over.
text_zh: 加拿大总理马克·卡尼：我们军队将每一美元中的70美分送往美国的时代已经结束了。

text: JD Vance: Whatever shortcomings the negotiations had, it wasn’t because of the Pakistanis, who did an amazing job and sincerely tried to help us and the Iranians bridge the gap and reach a deal.
text_zh: JD·万斯：无论谈判有什么缺点，那都不是因为巴基斯坦人，他们做得非常出色，并真诚地试图帮助我们和伊朗弥合分歧并达成协议。

text: JD Vance: We’ve had a number of substantive discussions with the Iranians. That’s the good news. The bad news is that we have not reached an agreement — and I think that’s bad news for Iran much more than it's bad news for the United States of America.
text_zh: JD·万斯：我们与伊朗人进行了多次实质性的讨论。这是好消息。坏消息是我们没有达成协议 — 我认为这对伊朗来说比对美利坚合众国来说是更糟糕的消息。

text: Trump attended a UFC event in Florida while talks with Iran collapsed in Pakistan.
text_zh: 特朗普在伊朗会谈于巴基斯坦破裂时参加了佛罗里达州的一场UFC赛事。

text: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Pakistani Foreign Minister: We hope that both the American and Iranian sides will continue to adhere to the ceasefire.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 巴基斯坦外交部长：我们希望美伊双方都能继续遵守停火协议。

text: Trump reposts after failed talks with Iran: The Trump card the president holds if Iran won’t bend: a naval blockade.
text_zh: 特朗普在与伊朗会谈失败后转发：如果伊朗不屈服，总统手中掌握的王牌：海军封锁。

text: Esmaeil Baghaei, Iran’s foreign ministry spokesperson, said there was no expectation of a deal with the United States, citing “an atmosphere of mistrust” after weeks of war. “We should not have expected an agreement in just one meeting,” he said, adding that while some common ground was found, “on two, three key topics there were significant differences.”
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）表示，鉴于数周战争后的“不信任氛围”，没有预期会与美国达成协议。“我们不应该期望在一次会议上就达成协议，”他说，并补充说，虽然找到了一些共同点，“但在两三个关键议题上存在重大分歧。”

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia announced the deployment of around 13,000 Pakistani troops and 10 to 18 Pakistan Air Force fighter jets to King Abdulaziz Air Base in the Eastern Sector under their joint strategic defence agreement. A Pakistani government official also confirmed the move, stating it is part of their defence pact under which an attack on one country would be treated as an attack on the other. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇸🇦 沙特阿拉伯宣布，根据其联合战略防御协议，向东部地区的阿卜杜勒阿齐兹国王空军基地部署了约13000名巴基斯坦士兵和10至18架巴基斯坦空军战斗机。一位巴基斯坦政府官员也证实了这一举动，称这是其防御条约的一部分，根据该条约，对一个国家的攻击将被视为对另一个国家的攻击。@wfwitness
